title: Harden read-only mission-control attention surfaces
description: Improve the read-only mission-control command-center surface so policy-gated work, policy rejections, drift warnings, and durable dead-letter pressure appear in the flight board and human-attention queue without adding write-capable controls.
acceptance_criteria: Policy-gated and policy-rejected tasks from runner snapshots are visible in flight-board data and attention items.
Source drift and dead-letter queue pressure produce explicit attention items while preserving the read-only/no-write contract.
Focused mission-control tests and MAP validators pass.
